title: Tender Citrusy Ukrainian Lamb Noodles
description: A comforting Ukrainian dish featuring brown rice noodles, tangy nuka-pickle, and a dairy-free friendly citrusy cream sauce.

ingredients.name: olive oil
ingredients.notes: or substitute with other neutral oil

instructions: Cook the brown rice noodles according to package instructions and set aside.
Season the lamb shoulder with salt, pepper, and your desired herbs or spices. Roast in the preheated oven for 2-3 hours, or until tender and easily shredded.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat. Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for an additional minute, until fragrant.
Stir in the nuka-pickle, lemon juice, and dairy-free cream. Bring the mixture to a simmer.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and toss with the sauce until well coated.
Add the shredded lamb to the skillet and toss to combine.
Season the dish with salt, pepper, and chopped fresh dill (if using).
